profile_backing.source: RCH reprofile after frankenjax-lsjey EquationList sharing
profile_backing.alien_primitive: immutable structural sharing plus retained-position bitset metadata

lever.description: Use the existing retained-position/forward-order DCE path for every non-empty Jaxpr instead of reserving it for large Jaxprs.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-2ndxj-clean-baseline-ts2 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

after.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-2ndxj-threshold16-vmi1149989 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Preserved. Both paths compute liveness by walking equations in reverse; retained_by_position emits the original forward equation order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Not applicable. DCE has no tie-breaking beyond original equation order, which is preserved.
isomorphism.floating_point: Unchanged. The lever does not change arithmetic, literals, dtype promotion, or abstract values.
isomorphism.rng: Unchanged. DCE uses no RNG state or seed.
isomorphism.used_inputs: Preserved by the same needed-input propagation and retained outvar filtering.

verification.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib test_dce_all_used_large_chain_golden_hash -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-interpreters --all-targets
verification.result: pass; peer fj-lax dead_code warning observed

verification.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-interpreters --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
verification.result: pass; peer fj-lax dead_code warning observed
exit 1 on pre-existing file-wide inventory; no DCE-hunk finding
